# Documentation

Welcome to the Web Article Summarizer documentation! 📚

---

## Available Documentation

### 🏗️ Architecture Documentation
Comprehensive guide to the system architecture, components, and design patterns.

- **English**: [ARCHITECTURE.md](ARCHITECTURE.md)
- **Italiano**: [ARCHITECTURE.it.md](ARCHITECTURE.it.md)

**Topics Covered**:
- System architecture overview
- Core components and their responsibilities
- Data flow and integration patterns
- AI provider integration
- Storage and caching strategies
- Security architecture
- Performance optimizations

---

### 📖 API Reference
Complete reference for all public APIs in the extension.

- **English**: [API.md](API.md)
- **Italiano**: [API.it.md](API.it.md)

**Topics Covered**:
- Core APIs (APIOrchestrator, ContentDetector, PromptBuilder)
- AI Integration APIs (APIResilience, RateLimiter)
- Storage APIs (StorageManager, CacheManager, HistoryManager)
- Security APIs (HtmlSanitizer, InputSanitizer)
- Export APIs (PDFExporter, MarkdownExporter, EmailManager)
- Utility APIs (I18n, Logger, VoiceController)
- Message protocol for Chrome extension communication

---

### 🤝 Contributing Guide
Guidelines for contributing to the project.

- **English**: [CONTRIBUTING.md](CONTRIBUTING.md)
- **Italiano**: [CONTRIBUTING.it.md](CONTRIBUTING.it.md)

**Topics Covered**:
- Getting started with development
- Development setup and workflow
- Coding standards and best practices
- Testing guidelines
- Commit message conventions
- Pull request process
- Areas for contribution

---

- [Main README](../../README.md) - Project overview and installation

## Documentation Structure

```
.github/docs/
├── README.md                 # This file
├── ARCHITECTURE.md           # Architecture documentation (English)
├── ARCHITECTURE.it.md        # Architecture documentation (Italian)
├── API.md                    # API reference (English)
├── API.it.md                 # API reference (Italian)
├── CONTRIBUTING.md           # Contributing guide (English)
└── CONTRIBUTING.it.md        # Contributing guide (Italian)
```

---

## Language Support

All documentation is available in:
- 🇺🇸 **English** - Primary language
- 🇮🇹 **Italiano** - Italian translation

Each document has language switcher links at the top for easy navigation between versions.

---

## Contributing to Documentation

Found an error or want to improve the documentation? Contributions are welcome!

1. Fork the repository
2. Make your changes
3. Submit a pull request

See [CONTRIBUTING.md](CONTRIBUTING.md) for detailed guidelines.
